Kql: datatable(x:long, g:string)[ 1,"a", 2,"a", 3,"b" ] | summarize s = sum(x) by g | where s > 2 | extend label = strcat("g_", g) | project label, s | order by s asc
Sql: SELECT label, s FROM (SELECT *, CONCAT('g_', g) AS label FROM (SELECT g, COALESCE(SUM(x), 0) AS s FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), 'a'), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), 'b')) AS t(x, g) GROUP BY ALL) WHERE s > 2) ORDER BY s ASC NULLS FIRST
Detail: rows match as a set but order differs

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a", "" ] | union (datatable(s:string)[ "c" ] | extend s=tostring(dynamic(null))) | extend e=isempty(s), n=isnull(s) | project s, e, n
Sql: SELECT s, e, n FROM (SELECT *, (s IS NULL OR CAST(s AS VARCHAR) = '') AS e, (s IS NULL) AS n FROM ((SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('a'), ('')) AS t(s)) UNION ALL BY NAME (SELECT * EXCLUDE (s), TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS s FROM (VALUES ('c')) AS t(s))))
Detail: first differing row[2]: kusto=('', True, False) duck=(null, True, True)
KSample: ('a', False, False) || ('', True, False) || ('', True, False)
DSample: ('a', False, False) || ('', True, False) || (null, True, True)

Kql: print l = strlen(""), n = strlen(tostring(dynamic(null)))
Sql: SELECT LENGTH(CAST('' AS VARCHAR)) AS l, LENGTH(CAST(TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS VARCHAR)) AS n
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=(0, 0) duck=(0, null)

Kql: print sub = substring("abc", 5, 3), neg = substring("abc", -1, 2)
Sql: SELECT SUBSTR(CAST('abc' AS VARCHAR), (5) + 1, 3) AS sub, SUBSTR(CAST('abc' AS VARCHAR), ((-1)) + 1, 2) AS neg

Kql: datatable(d:dynamic)[ dynamic(null), dynamic({"a":1}), dynamic([]) ] | extend t=gettype(d), n=isnull(d), an=array_length(d) | project t, n, an
Sql: SELECT t, n, an FROM (SELECT *, CASE WHEN TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) IN ('TINYINT','SMALLINT','INTEGER','BIGINT','HUGEINT','UTINYINT','USMALLINT','UINTEGER','UBIGINT','UHUGEINT') THEN 'long' WHEN TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) IN ('FLOAT','DOUBLE','REAL') OR TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) LIKE 'DECIMAL%' THEN 'real' WHEN TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) = 'VARCHAR' THEN 'string' WHEN TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) = 'BOOLEAN' THEN 'bool' WHEN TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) IN ('TIMESTAMP','DATE','TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE','TIMESTAMP_NS','TIMESTAMP_MS','TIMESTAMP_S') THEN 'datetime' WHEN TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) LIKE 'INTERVAL%' THEN 'timespan' WHEN TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) = 'UUID' THEN 'guid' WHEN TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) LIKE '%[]' OR TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) LIKE 'STRUCT%' OR TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) LIKE 'MAP%' THEN 'array' WHEN TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON)) = 'JSON' THEN (CASE WHEN json_type(CAST(CAST(d AS JSON) AS VARCHAR)) = 'ARRAY' THEN 'array' ELSE 'dictionary' END) ELSE LOWER(TYPEOF(CAST(d AS JSON))) END AS t, (CAST(d AS JSON) IS NULL) AS n, LEN(json_extract(CAST(d AS JSON), '$[*]')) AS an FROM (SELECT CAST(d AS JSON) AS d FROM (VALUES (CAST(NULL AS JSON)), (CAST('{"a":1}'::JSON AS JSON)), (CAST(LIST_VALUE() AS JSON))) AS t(d)))
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('null', True, null) duck=('dictionary', True, null)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "alpha-beta","alpha_beta","alpha beta","alphabeta" ] | where s has "alpha" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('alpha-beta'), ('alpha_beta'), ('alpha beta'), ('alphabeta')) AS t(s) WHERE regexp_matches(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '(?i)\balpha\b')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a1b2c3","abc","123","a1","9z9" ] | where s matches regex @"[a-z][0-9]" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('a1b2c3'), ('abc'), ('123'), ('a1'), ('9z9')) AS t(s) WHERE REGEXP_MATCHES(s, '@"[a-z][0-9]')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "2020-01-15","not a date","1999-12-31","abc-de-fg" ] | where s matches regex @"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$" | project s
Sql: SELECT s FROM (VALUES ('2020-01-15'), ('not a date'), ('1999-12-31'), ('abc-de-fg')) AS t(s) WHERE REGEXP_MATCHES(s, '@"^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "O'Brien","D'Angelo","normal","it's" ] | where s contains "'" | project s, q=strcat(s,"!")
Sql: SELECT s, CONCAT(s, '!') AS q FROM (VALUES ('O''Brien'), ('D''Angelo'), ('normal'), ('it''s')) AS t(s) WHERE s ILIKE '%%'

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "tab\there","newline","quote\"here","back\\slash" ] | project s, len=strlen(s), idx=indexof(s,"\\")
Sql: SELECT s, LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) AS len, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '\\') - 1) AS idx FROM (VALUES ('tab\there'), ('newline'), ('quote\"here'), ('back\\slash')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('tab	here', 8, -1) duck=('tab\there', 9, -1)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "hello","world","kusto" ] | project orig=s, sub1=substring(s,1,3), subneg=substring(s,-2,2), suboor=substring(s,2,100)
Sql: SELECT s AS orig, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (1) + 1, 3) AS sub1, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ((-2)) + 1, 2) AS subneg, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (2) + 1, 100) AS suboor FROM (VALUES ('hello'), ('world'), ('kusto')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "hello","abc","" ] | project s, sub_neglen=substring(s,1,-1), sub_zero=substring(s,0,0), sub_big=substring(s,10,5)
Sql: SELECT s, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (1) + 1, (-1)) AS sub_neglen, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (0) + 1, 0) AS sub_zero, SUBSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), (10) + 1, 5) AS sub_big FROM (VALUES ('hello'), ('abc'), ('')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a,b,c,d","one" ] | project p0=split(s,",")[0], p2=split(s,",")[2], p5=split(s,",")[5]
Sql: SELECT STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ',')[0 + 1] AS p0, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ',')[2 + 1] AS p2, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), ',')[5 + 1] AS p5 FROM (VALUES ('a,b,c,d'), ('one')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "key=val","a=b=c","noequals","=leading","trailing=" ] | project s, kv=split(s,"=",0), kv2=split(s,"=",1)
Sql: SELECT s, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '=') AS kv, STRING_SPLIT(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), '=') AS kv2 FROM (VALUES ('key=val'), ('a=b=c'), ('noequals'), ('=leading'), ('trailing=')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "xxabcxx","abc","xxx","" ] | project s, t=trim("x",s), tl=trim_start("x",s)
Sql: SELECT s, TRIM(s, 'x') AS t, LTRIM(s, 'x') AS tl FROM (VALUES ('xxabcxx'), ('abc'), ('xxx'), ('')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "hello world hello","hello","world" ] | project s, c=countof(s,"hello"), cregex=countof(s,"l+","regex")
Sql: SELECT s, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, 'hello', ''))) / LENGTH('hello') AS c, (LENGTH(s) - LENGTH(REPLACE(s, 'l+', ''))) / LENGTH('l+') AS cregex FROM (VALUES ('hello world hello'), ('hello'), ('world')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('hello world hello', 2, 3) duck=('hello world hello', 2, 0)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "abcabcabc","aaa","xyz" ] | project s, i_first=indexof(s,"a"), i_from=indexof(s,"a",2), i_none=indexof(s,"z")
Sql: SELECT s, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), 'a') - 1) AS i_first, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), 'a') - 1) AS i_from, (INSTR(CAST(s AS VARCHAR), 'z') - 1) AS i_none FROM (VALUES ('abcabcabc'), ('aaa'), ('xyz')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "a","b","c" ] | project cat=strcat(s,"-",s,"-",1,"-",true), catd=strcat_delim("|",s,s,"end")
Sql: SELECT CONCAT(s, '-', s, '-', 1, '-', TRUE) AS cat, CONCAT_WS('|', s, s, 'end') AS catd FROM (VALUES ('a'), ('b'), ('c')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "one two three","a-b-c","x" ] | project s, repl=replace_string(s," ","_"), reg=replace_regex(s,@"(\w+)",@"[\1]")
Sql: SELECT s, REPLACE(s, ' ', '_') AS repl, REGEXP_REPLACE(s, '@"(\w+)', '@"[\1]') AS reg FROM (VALUES ('one two three'), ('a-b-c'), ('x')) AS t(s)
Detail: first differing row[0]: kusto=('one two three', 'one_two_three', '[one] [two] [three]') duck=('one two three', 'one_two_three', 'one two three')

Kql: datatable(s:string)[ "2020-12-31T10:20:30","no match here","42-and-7" ] | project s, ext=extract(@"(\d+)-(\d+)",2,s), ext0=extract(@"(\d+)",0,s)
Sql: SELECT s, REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '@"(\d+)-(\d+)', 2) AS ext, REGEXP_EXTRACT(s, '@"(\d+)', 0) AS ext0 FROM (VALUES ('2020-12-31T10:20:30'), ('no match here'), ('42-and-7')) AS t(s)
